linting.notes: Formatting is based on Eclipse code style from kogito-ide-config. GRPC-generated files in explainability-connectors/src/main/java/org/kie/trustyai/connectors/kserve/v2/grpc/ are excluded from formatting.

testing.mock_patterns: Uses Mockito for mocking, test classes use @QuarkusTest annotation for integration tests
testing.notes: Multi-module Maven project with 4 modules. Tests are distributed across modules. Total of 226 test files. Surefire plugin configured with -Xmx2048m and --add-opens java.base/java.nio=ALL-UNNAMED. Integration tests are in separate module (explainability-integrationtests) and require -P integration-tests profile.

ci.notes: CI runs on ubuntu-22.04 with Java 17 and Maven versions 3.6.3, 3.8.8, 3.9.2 in a matrix. Formatting validation only runs on Ubuntu to avoid CR/LF issues. CI checks run on both push and pull_request events. Only runs on main repository, not forks.

build.notes: Multi-module Maven project. Modules: explainability-core, explainability-arrow, explainability-connectors, explainability-service. Uses Java 17. Maven wrapper (mvnw) available. Profiles: 'service-minimal' for CPaaS builds, 'integration-tests' to include integration tests, 'validate-formatting' to fail on format issues, 'quickly' to skip tests and formatting.

conventions.test_naming: JUnit 5 style: methods annotated with @Test, test classes end with 'Test'
conventions.import_style: Organized by groups: java., javax., org., com., io. Static imports after regular imports.
conventions.notes: Uses Eclipse code formatting style. No @author tags in Javadoc. Copyright headers enforced via license-maven-plugin.

lint_commands.notes: FAILURE: Found 1 file not formatted (KServeConfig.java). This is a real lint violation, not a broken command.
Not separately tested; typically run as part of formatter validation.

test_commands.notes: SUCCESS: 427 tests run, 1 failure, 5 skipped. Test framework works correctly; failure is in actual test logic.

container_recipe.notes: Container needs sufficient memory for Maven builds (2GB+ recommended). Tests include Quarkus integration tests that start embedded services.
